# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No build command specified"', description: 'Custom build command')
        string(name: 'TEST_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No test command specified"', description: 'Custom test command')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No deploy command specified"', description: 'Custom deploy command')
    }
    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.BUILD_COMMAND =~ /^[a-zA-Z0-9\s\-_.\/]+$/) {
                        sh params.BUILD_COMMAND
                    } else {
                        error 'Invalid characters in BUILD_COMMAND'
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.TEST_COMMAND =~ /^[a-zA-Z0-9\s\-_.\/]+$/) {
                        sh params.TEST_COMMAND
                    } else {
                        error 'Invalid characters in TEST_COMMAND'
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.DEPLOY_COMMAND =~ /^[a-zA-Z0-9\s\-_.\/]+$/) {
                        sh params.DEPLOY_COMMAND
                    } else {
                        error 'Invalid characters in DEPLOY_COMMAND'
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
